markers.description: manual onClick toggling of dialog state
dialog title framed as a question or action that names the subject
UI surfaces the case-sensitivity / exact-match requirement
hardcoded positioning via inline style transforms
sheet title names what the panel is for
form has a clear submit path (close on save, or explain staying open)
native <select> element used instead of primitive
placeholder passed to Select value primitive, not the trigger
raw onChange on the Select root (should be onValueChange)
Label associated via htmlFor with matching id on trigger
hardcoded role="combobox" / aria-expanded / aria-haspopup on the trigger
custom keydown handlers for arrow/Enter on the Select
uses SelectGroup + SelectLabel when timezone list has regions
timezone list is realistic and complete enough to use, OR clearly parameterized for caller to supply
FieldError used to render validation messages
uses react-hook-form OR explicit uncontrolled form pattern
FieldLabel has htmlFor matching a sibling input id
aria-invalid on the control paired with data-invalid on the Field when error state exists
submit button disabled/pending tied to form state
submit handler strongly typed from schema inference
validation covers email format, bio max, and name non-empty/min
FieldDescription rendered on at least one field with real helper text
defaultValue OR (value + onValueChange) on Tabs root
custom arrow-key handlers (Radix supplies roving tabindex)
each TabsContent has meaningful content or a clear scaffold per section
TabsTrigger values are semantic kebab/snake strings, not indices
DropdownMenu separator used between groups (<DropdownMenuSeparator>, <DropdownMenu.Separator>, etc.)
onSelect on at least one menu item (not onClick for the menu action)
menu item uses disabled prop (not conditional render)
Sign out item is visually distinguished
free-plan check is a prop or context, not hardcoded
align / side / sideOffset used for positioning
open/onOpenChange used OR left fully uncontrolled
renders a real color picker (swatches or HSL/RGB inputs), not just a text input
selected color is a controlled value with a change callback
error toast has longer duration or an action object
two distinct call sites or a helper that branches on result
messages are sentence-case and name the outcome
<Toaster /> mount mentioned in a comment or JSDoc
master checkbox derives state from children (not independent)
toggling master selects/deselects all children atomically
each radio item has an id, Label has matching htmlFor
name prop manually set on each radio item (should inherit from root)
Custom option reveals or hints at additional input
default value is a sensible pick (Monthly or Yearly)
